title: HumanOverrideArtifact
description: AgentPlane evidence artifact for a human override of a stop gate, guardrail decision, or policy gate. Required for waiving CI requirements, allowing protected branch writes, or overriding critical deny decisions. Signed override is preserved as first-class evidence.

overridden_artifact_ref.description: Ref to the stop gate, guardrail decision, or policy artifact being overridden

authority_ref.description: Human authority ref (post, user, or senior authorization); required — no anonymous overrides

override_reason.description: Explicit human-supplied reason; must not be empty

scope_constraints.description: Scope constraints on this override (e.g., limited to specific paths, tasks, or time window)

expires_at.description: Override expiry; if absent, single-use assumed
